0._value: #p506# of #m10004000# says she can't take one step out of town. I wonder why...

1._value: I met #p506# in #m10004000#. Apparently, she cannot remember anything about her childhood, and she lives everyday in fear of #o6#s. She's so scared that she can't even dare to look at them. Due to this paralyzing fear of #o6#s, she cannot take one step out of #m10004000#, and asks me to take them out for her sake. Are they really THAT scary?

2._value: I took out #o6#s for #p506#'s sake in #m10004000#. She can finally venture outside without having to worry about them!

0._value: Excuse me~ I know it's rude to ask a stranger, but can you please help me out? I'm terrified of the #o6#s that are wandering around outside this town and can't leave because of them. I can't even make eye contact with them without being scared to death. Please, if you have some time on your hands, can you help me out?
Thank you so much~ I knew you would say yes. As you can see, I am not from the tribes here. According to the elders, they found me lost in the streets years ago, all bruised up and messy.

1._value: The elders saved me, and I have been living here ever since. Unfortunately, I don't remember anything from the past. Something might have happened back then.

2._value: I think I can't remember my past because I went through something so horrible in the past that my head chose to block it all out. Maybe that's why I'm so scared of #o6#s. Can you do me a favor and take out some #r#o6#s#k please?

0._value: You must be busy. If you find some spare time later on, please come by and talk to me.
Wow, thank you so much! I don't see as many #o6#s near #m10004000# now! I feel like I can finally take a step outside. Thank you so much for your hard work!
I don’t think you've gotten all the #r#o6#s#k yet. Please help me, I want to be able to go out of town as soon as I can.
